source: independent (non-author) pred-scout-coach-critic reviewing data/postgame/*.json coaching against the match facts; preference-based / ungrounded lines flagged; grounded rewrites applied back

a70c4ff3-9ba8-4ce9-a1cb-1f0459381b0e.quote: This loss was not the lanes: mid, offlane, jungle and support all read favored and stayed ours all game, and we won more fights than they did (5 to 4). It was the exchange rate. We cashed 2 of our 5 won fights (the 16.5, 19.2 and 26-minute wins bought nothing); they cashed 2 of 4 and every fight we lost carried a price tag — Bayle's 15.9 pickoff became their Fangtooth at 16.2, the 21.9 loss became their tower at 22.4, and the two end-game dives became the tower chain that ended it. Those two dives were the same mistake taken twice: all five of us pushed past their towers, 1-5 at their inner tower at 23.5 and 2-5 at their inhibitor at 28.3, into a Neon who finished 16/5/2 with 39k damage. The modeled item counts say we were AHEAD in both fights (14-8, then 15-9) — the gold was fine, the call was not. Objectives ended 9-24. Up two lanes, make them walk to us; don't hand a fed midlaner defense fights on their side of the map.
a70c4ff3-9ba8-4ce9-a1cb-1f0459381b0e.issue: wrong cashed-fight reference: the 16.5 win DID cash (our outer tower fell at 16.5 per EVENTS); the uncashed win was 14.9
a70c4ff3-9ba8-4ce9-a1cb-1f0459381b0e.rewrite: This loss was not the lanes: mid, offlane, jungle and support all read favored, and we won more fights than they did (5 to 4). It was the exchange rate. We cashed 2 of our 5 won fights (the 14.9, 19.2 and 26-minute wins bought nothing); they cashed 2 of 4 and every fight we lost carried a price tag — Bayle's 15.9 pickoff became their Fangtooth at 16.2, the 21.9 loss became their tower at 22.4, and the two end-game dives became the tower chain that ended it. Those two dives were the same mistake taken twice: all five of us pushed past their towers, 1-5 at their inner tower at 23.5 and 2-5 at their inhibitor at 28.3, into a fed Neon. The modeled item counts say we were AHEAD in both fights (14-8, then 15-9) — the gold was fine, the call was not. Objectives ended 9-24. Up four lanes, make them walk to us; don't hand a fed midlaner defense fights on their side of the map.

b82d070b-e13e-4c63-8a2b-42e65fc69fd5.quote: We played this exactly the way the wins are drawn up. Nobody on our side died outside a fight all game (they did, five times), and every fight happened on our terms: 4-0 at our Fangtooth at 6.5, 5-1 at our outer tower at 13 against their full five, 4-0 at their River at 16.1. The 6.5 fight is the one to rewatch — Zinx and Drongo beat four of them 4-0 while Fangtooth and Mini Prime were secured in the same window, a fight AND the map at once. Objectives finished 12-7 and towers 2-0 in 17 minutes. Murdock and Drongo went a combined 16/0.
b82d070b-e13e-4c63-8a2b-42e65fc69fd5.issue: Mini Prime fell at 9.3, nearly three minutes after the 6.5 fight, not in the same window; '16.1 at their River' location is not in the SOURCE

b82d070b-e13e-4c63-8a2b-42e65fc69fd5.quote: The 6.5-minute fight at our Fangtooth: two of us (Zinx and Drongo) beat four of them 4-0 with Fangtooth and Mini Prime taken in the same window — the map lead never flipped after that.
b82d070b-e13e-4c63-8a2b-42e65fc69fd5.issue: Mini Prime came at 9.3, not in the 6.5 fight's window (Fangtooth at 7.3 was the cash)

ba11d68b-bfbd-4081-a335-4570488f974d.quote: We never lost a fight: six clashes, six wins, and a 23-3 kill stream in 17 minutes. Dekker opened with first blood at 2.4 and finished 10/0/5, Murdock went 7/1/8 and Ikra 5/1/3 — the fed trio won the 8.3, 9.7 and 11.1 fights 3-0, 4-0 and 4-0. The one leak worth keeping from a stomp: of six won fights we cashed two — the 2.4, 8.3, 12.9 and 15.7 wins turned into nothing on the map, so towers read only 2-1 at the end. When a fight ends 4-0, walk to a tower before resetting.
ba11d68b-bfbd-4081-a335-4570488f974d.issue: wrong uncashed-fight list: the 15.7 win DID cash (our outer tower at 15.9 per EVENTS); the uncashed win was 9.7
ba11d68b-bfbd-4081-a335-4570488f974d.rewrite: We never lost a fight: six clashes, six wins, and a 23-3 kill stream in 17 minutes. Dekker opened with first blood at 2.4 and finished 10/0/5, Murdock went 7/1/8 and Ikra 5/1/3 — the fed trio won the 8.3, 9.7 and 11.1 fights 3-0, 4-0 and 4-0. The one leak worth keeping from a stomp: of six won fights we cashed two — the 11.1 win bought Fangtooth at 11.2 and the 15.7 win bought a tower at 15.9, while the 2.4, 8.3, 9.7 and 12.9 wins turned into nothing on the map — so towers read only 2-1 at the end. When a fight ends 4-0, walk to a tower before resetting.
